markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Darrell introduces Saskia to a new workflow for generating AI-assisted content, focusing on improvements and clarifications to the existing process.](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [A new "Ideal Path" workflow has been developed to improve content generation, with renamed steps for clarity and better artifacts for Unstructured](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Key areas for human intervention: brief stage and outline stage, which significantly impact subsequent automated steps](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [The research step is crucial; it's the only part that gathers external information, which all later steps rely on](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Fact-checking flow is currently broken and under investigation by the engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)

## Topics

### New Workflow Overview

  - [Renamed steps for clarity (e.g., "keyword-driven title" instead of just "keyword")](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [More detailed company context and writing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Removal of redundant steps (e.g., title selection)](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Focus on providing over-detailed information initially, allowing for trimming later](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)

### Research and Content Generation

  - [Research URLs can be used to limit scope and improve credibility of sources](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Adding specific URLs (e.g., HBR articles) can significantly reduce hallucinations](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [The brief generates research, which is then used for all subsequent steps](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [No additional external information is gathered after the research step](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)

### Editing and Feedback

  - [Edits should be made like substantive editing in a Google Doc](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Use four slashes (//// ) to separate distinct pieces of feedback](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [The system chunks feedback to apply it more effectively](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)

### Audience and Style Considerations

  - [Current audience personas may not align with client expectations; further clarification needed](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Existing client content seems focused on specific use cases rather than general audience education](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Suggestion to create fundamental articles for internal linking and SEO improvement](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)

### AI-Generated Content Concerns

  - [Discussion on the future of AI content in search engine optimization](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)
  - [Potential preference of LLMs for finding information generated by other LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
  - [Unreliability of current AI content detectors](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saskia to experiment with the new workflow and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Darrell to rename some steps that reverted to old names](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Investigate the broken fact-checking flow with the engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Clarify audience expectations with the account management team](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Consider creating more general, educational content for Unstructured to improve internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/_EhgqNQ81x7c6rW-Lf5LmpsSF2WruF7t?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
